The ideal candidate holds a Bachelor's degree or above (preferably in Education, Educational Technology, or Social Sciences), though Technical Assistants with 5 HKDSE Level 2+ subjects including Chinese, English, and Mathematics are also considered. Fluency in written and spoken English and Cantonese is essential, with preference given to candidates with educational research experience and knowledge of AI applications in education. The role offers a temporary full-time or part-time contract with potential renewal and benefits provided according to institutional policy.

title: Part-time Technical Assistant(s) (R6694) (S&T)
description: This is a part-time technical assistant position within the School of Science and Technology, primarily supporting a research project on antibiotic detection and degradation in wastewater. Responsibilities include assisting with report writing and conducting research activities under the direction of the Principal Investigator and supervisors. Candidates should hold at least five HKDSE Level 2 subjects (including English, Chinese, and Mathematics) or equivalent, with preference given to current science students, particularly those with Environmental Science or Chemistry backgrounds. The role requires strong organizational and interpersonal skills, and successful applicants will be appointed on a temporary part-time contract with statutory benefits.

title: Part-time Lecturer for PTH 3303ECF (2026 Summer Term) (E&L)
description: This is a part-time lecturer position for the summer term 2026, based in the School of Education and Languages, teaching PTH 3303ECF to students pursuing honours degrees in Putonghua and Chinese Teaching or Chinese Language Linguistics Research. The role requires expertise in education and language instruction, with the ability to deliver high-quality professional education aligned with industry standards. The position is temporary, spanning only the summer term, and candidates should be prepared for a decision timeline of up to eight weeks following the application deadline.

title: Full-time/Temporary Research Assistant I (Project No.: R7504) (E&L)
description: This is a full-time, temporary one-year research assistant position within the School of Education and Languages supporting a project on detecting driver intoxication through linguistic analysis. The role requires a Master's degree in computing, artificial intelligence, or related fields, with expert-level Python proficiency and experience in machine learning, language modeling, and database development. Key responsibilities include assisting with data collection and analysis, building language models, implementing deep learning and large language model technologies, and supporting the digitalization of research databases. Prior experience in language database compilation or language model development is advantageous, and the contract is renewable based on performance.

title: Associate Professor(s)/Assistant Professor(s)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: The Department of Accountancy seeks Associate or Assistant Professors with strong research credentials and a balanced commitment to research, teaching, and professional engagement across all accounting areas, with particular preference for specialists in corporate governance, sustainability, auditing, and assurance. Candidates must hold a PhD degree and professional accounting certification. The positions are situated within a highly-ranked private liberal arts institution that emphasizes small-class teaching, close student-teacher relationships, and research impact, supported by its AACSB-accredited business school and commitment to innovative interdisciplinary education. The role offers the opportunity to contribute to both scholarly advancement and undergraduate/postgraduate education within a regional leader in business education.

title: Associate Professor/Assistant Professor (Full-time)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: The position is a full-time Associate or Assistant Professor in the Department of Economics and Finance, responsible for teaching specialist modules across finance, economics, real estate development, investment, and emerging areas like FinTech and ESG, alongside programme development, research, and administrative duties. Candidates must hold a PhD in Finance, Economics, or related fields, with proven teaching experience at undergraduate and master levels, strong research records and publications, and fluency in English; Putonghua is advantageous. The role is distinctive in its emphasis on interdisciplinary finance topics and its particular interest in real estate expertise, where RICS-chartered qualifications are preferred. This position is embedded within a regionally-ranked liberal-arts business school that combines rigorous research expectations with close student engagement and innovative pedagogical approaches.

title: Lecturer
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This Lecturer position in Economics and Finance requires designing and delivering modules across finance, economics, real estate, investment, and emerging areas like FinTech and ESG, alongside contributions to programme development and active research engagement. Candidates must hold a PhD in Finance, Economics, or a related discipline with substantial tertiary teaching experience at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels, demonstrable research outputs, and a strong publication record. The role encompasses student development responsibilities and administrative duties within a liberal-arts-oriented institution that emphasizes small-class teaching and close faculty-student relationships. The institution distinguishes itself through AACSB accreditation, regional rankings, and an integrated living-learning residential college system designed to develop critical thinking and social responsibility.

title: Associate Professor / Assistant Professor (Full-time)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: The Department of Management seeks full-time Associate or Assistant Professor-level faculty with strong research credentials and a PhD degree to contribute to a liberal-arts-oriented business school in Hong Kong. Primary responsibilities include conducting impactful research, teaching management courses within a small-class, interactive learning environment, and participating in departmental service and governance. The position is distinctive for its location within a highly-ranked private institution that emphasizes close student-teacher relationships, innovative curricula, and integration of professional and liberal education, while also offering opportunities to contribute to a school pursuing top-tier international accreditations (AACSB and EQUIS). Successful candidates should be prepared to engage in both undergraduate and postgraduate instruction and contribute to the university's research profile in management-related fields.

title: Associate Professor / Assistant Professor (Full-time)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: The Department of Management seeks a full-time Associate Professor or Assistant Professor with a PhD and strong publication record in macro-level management fields such as International Business, Strategic Management, Entrepreneurship, or Sustainability. The successful candidate will be responsible for research, teaching at tertiary level, and student engagement within a liberal arts-oriented institution that emphasizes close faculty-student relationships and innovative pedagogy. Key requirements include demonstrated excellence in top-tier journal publications, tertiary teaching experience, and commitment to scholarly activities. The position offers a competitive salary commensurate with qualifications, with an anticipated start date of January 2026.

title: Assistant Professor (Full-time)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This full-time Assistant Professor position in Marketing seeks a PhD-qualified scholar with a strong publication record in top-tier journals and demonstrated teaching experience at the tertiary level. The role requires candidates to teach across diverse marketing modules, conduct research with publication aspirations in world-leading journals, and actively engage in service to students and stakeholders. Applicants must show strong commitment to both scholarly activities and student engagement, with the position offering a start date of January or August 2026 and salary based on qualifications and experience.

title: Assistant Professor
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
department: Department of Mathematics, Statistics and Insurance
description: This Assistant Professor position in the Department of Mathematics, Statistics and Insurance seeks a doctorate holder with strong research credentials and publications in statistics, applied mathematics, actuarial science, insurance, or related fields. Primary responsibilities include teaching courses in data science, actuarial science, insurance, and risk management; conducting research and publishing in leading peer-reviewed journals; and facilitating industry connections through professional talks and events for students. The role also encompasses scholarly contributions and administrative duties within a liberal arts-oriented university that emphasizes undergraduate education, small-class teaching, and research impact across the Asia-Pacific region.

title: Senior Lecturer / Lecturer
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This position involves teaching and curriculum development across undergraduate, postgraduate, and general education levels in social science, along with research and administrative duties. Candidates must hold a doctorate in Political Science, Sociology, or East Asian Studies with demonstrated expertise in social science research methods, substantial tertiary teaching experience, and administrative background in higher education. The role requires ability to teach global affairs and social sustainability with particular focus on Asian contexts, addressing topics such as urbanisation, international relations, and societal transformation. The institution is a regionally-ranked liberal arts university emphasizing small-class teaching, close student-faculty relationships, and research impact.

title: Associate Professor / Assistant Professor (Full-time)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
department: Department of Supply Chain and Information Management
description: This full-time position in the Department of Supply Chain and Information Management seeks an Associate or Assistant Professor to teach specialist modules, contribute to programme development, conduct research, and fulfill administrative duties. Candidates must hold a doctoral degree in a related field with strong expertise in areas such as Management Science, Supply Chain Management, Transportation, or Aviation, along with proven teaching and research experience at tertiary level and a solid publication record. Preference is given to applicants with industry experience and proficiency in both English and Chinese. The role emphasizes the institution's commitment to research-informed teaching within a liberal arts framework focused on student-centered education and community engagement.

title: Part-time Instructor(s) (Action Learning and Experiential Teaching)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: The position is a part-time instructor role within the School of Business focused on action learning and experiential teaching methodologies. The instructor will be responsible for designing and delivering interactive, experience-based courses that develop students' practical skills and critical thinking within the liberal arts-professional education model. Ideal candidates should possess expertise in experiential pedagogy and demonstrate ability to facilitate active learning environments that prepare students for professional practice. This role is distinctive given the School's recent AACSB accreditation, pursuit of EQUIS accreditation, and commitment to innovative teaching approaches that distinguish it as a leading business school in Asia.

title: Assistant Professor
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This Assistant Professor position in the School of Transdisciplinary Studies seeks a scholar to develop and teach interdisciplinary programmes while contributing to research and institutional initiatives. The ideal candidate holds a doctoral degree in health studies, social policy, higher education leadership, or related fields, with substantial teaching experience and a proven track record in programme development, preferably in interdisciplinary contexts. Key responsibilities include designing curriculum and accreditation documentation, teaching courses, advancing transdisciplinary collaboration across the institution, and maintaining scholarly productivity. The role emphasizes collaborative leadership, student engagement, and self-motivation within a liberal-arts-oriented university committed to innovative, interdisciplinary education.

title: Associate Professor / Assistant Professor
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
department: School of Translation and Foreign Languages
description: This position is for an Associate or Assistant Professor in the School of Translation and Foreign Languages, requiring a doctorate in translation studies or related field and a demonstrated record of tertiary-level teaching and research. Key responsibilities include delivering undergraduate and postgraduate courses, developing course materials and assessments, supervising student projects, contributing to programme quality assurance, conducting scholarly research and publication, and participating in academic governance and external engagement activities. The role is distinctive for being embedded in a liberal-arts-oriented institution that emphasizes small-class teaching, close student-teacher relationships, and a combination of academic rigor with professional education. The position offers the opportunity to contribute to a regionally-ranked institution with strong commitments to research impact, employability outcomes, and community engagement.

title: Manager (Facility Management Services)
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This position manages facility management services for a private liberal-arts university in Hong Kong with over 7,000 students across six schools. The role is part of the Campus Development and Management Office and requires responsibility for maintaining and overseeing campus facilities to support the institution's operations and its commitment to providing award-winning green campus infrastructure. The university is internationally recognized, holding AACSB accreditation for its business school and ranking highly in regional and global university rankings, indicating a well-resourced institution with substantial facilities to manage. The ideal candidate will need strong facility management expertise and the ability to maintain standards consistent with the university's emphasis on quality infrastructure and campus excellence.

title: Director of School of Transdisciplinary Studies
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: The Director of the School of Transdisciplinary Studies will lead one of six schools at a Hong Kong-based liberal arts university serving over 7,000 students. The role requires overseeing academic programme development, faculty management, and student support within a transdisciplinary framework that emphasises critical thinking, innovation, and social responsibility. The successful candidate should demonstrate strong leadership in advancing research impact, fostering collaborative teaching approaches, and aligning the school's offerings with the institution's "Liberal + Professional" educational model and its established reputation for excellence in employability and community engagement.

title: Security Superintendent
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This position oversees daily campus security operations, including staff scheduling, access control systems, CCTV monitoring, and emergency preparedness planning, while developing and enforcing security policies and conducting risk assessments. The role requires an accredited qualification in Security Management or related field, a QAS certificate, security personnel permit, and a minimum of 8 years in security operations with at least 5 years in a supervisory capacity. Key competencies include expertise in security systems, emergency response, risk management, and familiarity with relevant laws and regulations, alongside strong leadership and communication skills. The position is distinctive for its comprehensive responsibility for protecting a large liberal arts university campus with over 7,000 students across multiple schools and facilities.

title: Executive Officer
university_full: Hang Seng University of Hong Kong
description: This Executive Officer position in the Registry involves managing student recruitment and admission functions, including liaising with Schools and external stakeholders, organizing promotion activities for prospective students, and compiling recruitment-related data and reports. The role requires a bachelor's degree with at least 3 years of relevant experience preferably in student recruitment and event organization, along with proficiency in English and Chinese (both Cantonese and Putonghua) and strong computer literacy. The successful candidate will also provide secretarial support to committees and contribute to broader Registry operations. This is a key administrative role at a leading private liberal-arts university in Hong Kong that emphasizes student development and support services.

title: Associate Vice-President (Quality Assurance)
description: Associate Vice-President (Quality Assurance). Please visit the application link for full details.

title: Director
description: The position requires a director to lead the Information Technology Services Centre with extensive managerial experience in higher education administration, ideally gained from a similar role in local or international institutions. Candidates must hold a postgraduate qualification, with a doctorate preferred, and demonstrate at least five years of relevant senior-level administrative experience. Fluency in both English and Chinese, in written and spoken forms, is essential. This role is distinctive in requiring both advanced academic credentials and proven leadership experience specifically within higher education IT service environments.

title: Clinic Manager cum Senior Lecturer
department: S.K. Yee School of Health Sciences
description: This combined clinical and academic role involves establishing and expanding a physiotherapy service at a practice clinic while delivering patient care and supervising undergraduate physiotherapy students. The position requires a Master's degree in physiotherapy or related field, current registration and practicing certificate as a physiotherapist in Hong Kong, and at least 5 years of professional experience at senior level. Key responsibilities include clinical service delivery, clinical education, research facilitation, and institutional development. The role is distinctive in its dual emphasis on clinical practice expansion and academic teaching within an integrated education centre.

title: [Full-time / Part-time] Associate Professors / Assistant Professors / Senior Lecturers
department: School of Business and Hospitality Management
description: The position requires teaching across multiple subject areas at sub-degree through postgraduate levels, alongside scholarly research and administrative duties in business and hospitality management. Candidates for Assistant Professor must hold a PhD in a relevant discipline plus relevant teaching or professional experience, with preference for those demonstrating strong undergraduate/postgraduate teaching records, programme management expertise, and proven research output. Senior Lecturer applicants require a Master's degree and professional membership, along with a minimum of three years of supervisory or managerial industry experience. Strong English proficiency is essential, with Chinese language skills preferred.

title: Research Professor
description: This Research Professor position requires leading the school's research initiatives while producing internationally competitive research output and fostering a culture of scholarly excellence. The role involves mentoring junior faculty and postdoctoral researchers, collaborating with domestic and international institutions on research projects, and advising on academic programme quality and staff performance. Candidates must hold a PhD, possess substantial professorial-level research experience and publications, demonstrate a proven track record of securing major external grants, and bring established networks within local industry and educational sectors. The position is distinctive for its emphasis on strategic alignment with institutional goals, high-impact research leadership, and professional development of emerging researchers.

title: Assistant Professors/ Senior Lecturers/ Lecturers
department: S.K. Yee School of Health Sciences
description: The position involves teaching and research in pharmaceutical dispensing within health sciences at the lecturer, senior lecturer, or assistant professor level. Candidates must hold a Master's degree in a relevant discipline, with strong preference for those possessing a Doctoral degree and prior experience teaching in tertiary programmes. Fluency in both English and Chinese is essential. The role emphasises expertise in pharmaceutical dispensing and commitment to academic development.

title: [Full-time/ Part-time] Assistant Professor/ Lecturer
department: Yam Pak Charitable Foundation School of Computing and Information Sciences
description: This position requires a computing and information sciences academic to deliver teaching across undergraduate and postgraduate programmes while contributing to curriculum development and review. The role demands a strong research focus, with expectation of publications in top-tier journals, alongside engagement in consultancy and scholarly activities. Additional academic and administrative responsibilities may be assigned by the Dean as needed.

title: Fieldwork Coordinator cum Lecturer/ Senior Lecturer
department: Felizberta Lo Padilla Tong School of Social Sciences
description: The appointee will be responsible (i) to co-ordinate fieldwork placement; (ii) to liaise with agency for fieldwork places; (iii) to convene fieldwork co-ordination other related meetings; and (iv) to perform teaching and related duties.

title: [Full-time/Part-time] Assistant Professors / Senior Lecturers / Lecturers
department: Felizberta Lo Padilla Tong School of Social Sciences
description: This position invites applications for academic roles (Assistant Professor, Senior Lecturer, or Lecturer level) within a social sciences school. Candidates must hold a Master's degree in a relevant discipline and demonstrate teaching or professional experience, though priority will be given to those with doctoral qualifications and evidence of teaching at degree level or strong research records. Professional registration in Hong Kong or internationally is a mandatory requirement for the specific discipline.

title: [Full-time/Part-time] Professors / Associate Professors
department: Felizberta Lo Padilla Tong School of Social Sciences
description: The position involves teaching responsibilities across degree and sub-degree level programmes within the School of Social Sciences. Candidates must hold a doctoral degree in a relevant discipline and demonstrate substantial teaching or professional experience, with preference given to those with degree-level teaching experience or a strong research record. Professional registration in Hong Kong or an equivalent overseas jurisdiction is a mandatory requirement for the specific discipline. This is a full-time or part-time appointment at either Professor or Associate Professor level.

title: Part-time Research Assistant
description: This part-time research assistant role supports a humanities research project with responsibilities spanning administrative coordination, data collection and preprocessing, participant recruitment, data annotation, dataset management, and report preparation. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree in a humanities field and demonstrate solid research experience alongside strong communication and teamwork capabilities. Bilingual proficiency in Chinese and English, both written and spoken, is essential, along with competent computer skills. The position values collaborative work ethic and the ability to manage multiple research support tasks efficiently.

title: Research Assistant
description: This Research Assistant position supports a five-year psychosocial study examining service outcomes for students with special educational needs, involving literature review, interview coordination and analysis, data analysis, report compilation, and administrative support. Candidates must hold a bachelor's degree or higher in education, applied research, psychology, statistics, or social work, with demonstrated experience in quantitative and/or qualitative research methods. The role requires proficiency in conducting in-depth interviews and analyzing quantitative data, alongside strong independent work capabilities, attention to detail, and analytical thinking. Fluency in English and Chinese, combined with excellent communication skills, is essential.

title: Senior Research Associate
department: School of Computing and Information Sciences
description: This role is a Senior Research Associate within a construction technology project focused on monitoring and controlling tower cranes through Digital Twin AI and IoT systems. Key responsibilities include conducting interviews and focus groups, collecting and analyzing quantitative data, and developing operational manuals and training materials. Candidates should hold at least a Bachelor's degree (Master's/MPhil preferred) in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related fields, with demonstrated experience in statistical data analysis, strong independent working ability, and excellent communication and writing skills; prior publication experience is advantageous.

title: Research Assistant
department: S School of Computing and Information Sciences
description: This Research Assistant position involves collecting and analyzing data to evaluate wet electrostatic precipitator performance and recommend improvements, while contributing to peer-reviewed publications and conference presentations. The role requires close collaboration with a project lead and team members to achieve research objectives, along with mentoring responsibilities for undergraduate and graduate students. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, with demonstrated experience in statistical data analysis, independent work capability, and strong communication and writing skills. Prior publication experience is preferred.

title: Part-time Senior Research Assistant
department: Ip Ying To Lee Yu Yee School of Humanities and Languages
description: This part-time senior research assistant position involves comprehensive support for a research project, including data collection and preprocessing, statistical analysis, trend projection, data management, and report preparation. Candidates must hold a Master's degree, preferably interdisciplinary, with demonstrated research experience and a publication record. The role requires strong communication skills, proficiency in English and computer applications, and flexibility to work across diverse project materials.

title: Part-time Research Assistant
department: Rita Tong Liu School of Business and Hospitality Management
description: Three part-time research assistants will be appointed across distinct disciplinary areas—Accounting & Finance, Entrepreneurship & Management, and Hotel & Tourism & Marketing—each supporting research projects through literature reviews, data collection and analysis, database management, and report preparation. Candidates must hold a Bachelor's degree or higher with demonstrated research experience and proficiency in statistical and database tools such as SPSS, SQL, and MS Access. Strong communication skills, bilingual competency in English and Chinese (including Putonghua), and solid computer literacy are essential, alongside a collaborative attitude and positive work approach.
